rules_fired.name: No Units Approved Sem 1
rules_fired.message: Enrolled in 7 units but approved 0 in semester 1

reasoning_chain: [CRITICAL] No Units Approved Sem 1: Enrolled in 7 units but approved 0 in semester 1
[HIGH] Low Approval Rate Sem 2: Only 1/7 units approved in sem 2 (14%)
[HIGH] Tuition Not Paid: Tuition fees are overdue
[MEDIUM] Debtor: Student flagged as a debtor
[CRITICAL] Financial + Academic Crisis: Tuition overdue AND failing academically
[MEDIUM] Mature Student Struggling: Mature student (age 37) showing academic risk

agent3.summary: This mature student is facing a critical combination of academic and financial challenges, including overdue tuition and failing grades.

interventions.action: Contact the student to discuss their academic progress and potential solutions for catching up on units. Offer support in navigating the process of re-enrolling or adjusting course load.
Connect with the student's financial aid office to explore options for tuition assistance or payment plans.  Offer resources and guidance on accessing potential scholarships.
Recommend connecting with campus counseling services or other support groups for academic and emotional well-being. Offer information about tutoring and study skills workshops.

agent3.message_to_student: We understand you're facing a challenging situation academically and financially. We are here to help you navigate this, so please reach out to us for support and guidance.
